form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign third of 12 at this track Rtg 58+ December 27 over 1200m, a neck behind Sparkle Corner carrying 57kg at $4.20. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 1.4 len this track Cl2 November 26 over 1107m defeating Send It Son carrying 59kg at $3.10. Loves this track and trip and can return on a winning note.

Can bounce back to winning ways dropping right back in grade.
